senses.def_en: to be useful or helpful to
senses.example: The plants benefited from the rain. // a trade agreement that will greatly benefit the developing world
senses.example_zh: 植物得益于这场雨。// 对发展中国家十分有利的一项贸易协定

senses.example: A balanced diet and a moderate amount of sports are beneficial to health.
senses.example_zh: 均衡的饮食和适度的运动有益于健康。

senses.def_en: present and ready for use; easy or possible to get or use
senses.def_zh: 现成可使用的;可得到的
senses.example: All the available money has been used. // I'm not available in the office now.
senses.example_zh: 手头上所有的钱都用完了。// 我现在不在办公室。

senses.example: It is feasible to apply the computer to language teaching.
senses.example_zh: 将计算机应用到语言教学是可行的。

senses.example: Wilde was emphatic about the importance of being punctual.
senses.example_zh: 王尔德强调严守时间的重要性。

senses.example: His report places emphasis on the need for better working conditions.
senses.example_zh: 他的报告强调需要更好的工作条件。

senses.def_en: to give special attention to; stress
senses.example: He emphasized the need for hard work.

senses.def_en: showing the ability to use language clearly and effectively
senses.example: Martin Luther King's eloquent speeches have moved men throughout the US.
senses.example_zh: 马丁·路德·金雄辩的演讲感动了全美国的人。

senses.def_en: showing a feeling or meaning without using words
senses.example: The photographs are an eloquent reminder of the horrors of war.
senses.example_zh: 这些照片形象地提醒人们不要忘记战争的恐怖。

senses.def_en: able to speak a language very well
senses.example: An interpreter must be fluent in at least two languages.
senses.example_zh: 一名口译人员必须至少能流利地讲两门语言。

senses.def_en: having an intended or expected effect
senses.example: We hope the government will take effective measures to reduce pollution.
senses.example_zh: 我们希望政府采取有效措施减少污染。

senses.example: He gave an effective performance as Othello.
senses.example_zh: 他演的奥赛罗令人印象深刻。

senses.example: There is a decline in the effective demand.

senses.def_en: an unpleasant effect that remains for a long time after the condition or event that caused it
senses.example: Some drugs are avoided because of their harmful aftereffects.
senses.example_zh: 有些药物避免使用,因为有副作用。

senses.example: The very essence of literature is the war between emotion and intellect.
senses.example_zh: 文学的本质是情感与理智的斗争。

extras.title: 表示“益处”的名词
extras.content: benefit:指某项政策、活动给人们带来的实际好处,但不能指“利润”。profit:可指金钱或其他方面的利益。
Children often sleep with parents, and brothers or sisters share a bed, emphasizing familial interdependence. 译文:孩子们常常和父母一起睡,兄弟或姐妹睡一张床,突出家庭内部的相互依赖性。
